packageRules.description: Hold TypeScript on 6.x. TypeScript 7 is the native (Go) compiler port and ships only the `tsc` CLI, not the programmatic compiler API that our build/docs toolchain needs: tsup's .d.ts generation crashes on it, and no TypeScript-7-compatible typedoc exists yet (even typedoc 1.0.0-dev.* crashes at runtime). `npm run build` and `npm run docs` therefore break under TS 7. Lift this ceiling once tsup's DTS path and typedoc support the native compiler. See PR #34.
